name: Creole Summer Squash
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Garlic clove - peeled and minced
1 medium Green bell pepper - stemmed and finely chopped
1/2 lb Baby yellow pattypan squash or baby yellow crook
1/2 lb Baby zucchini - stem ends removed
1 tbsp Fresh thyme or savory - chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion, garlic, and bell pepper; sauté for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in chopped tomatoes, wine, thyme, cayenne, salt, and pepper.
4. Simmer for 10 minutes, until the sauce starts to thicken. Stir occasionally.
5. Put baby squash and zucchini into the pan. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, for 10 to 15 minutes. The squash should still have a little crunch to it.
6. Stir in balsamic vinegar and fresh thyme or savory. Serve hot or at room temperature.
